{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":10}","has_more":true,"total":245},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6845176845861011470","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，很精彩，主角运气很好，厉害的对手较少，加油更新呀，作者有点好色，老提醒别人别想歪，哈哈(ಡωಡ)hiahiahia"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1593766937,"group_id":"6511591548549860359","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3hVeZstz3nFDYBDVWlSuc4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/97f30b166a3749d6bd0700ec3ebffe34~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776706769\u0026x-signature=xmka%2BH0i8v6WPDbcAGmSduE5lig%3D","user_id":"108882885645","user_name":"苦行僧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108882885645","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6511591548549860359","book_info":{"abstract":"生命总会找到出路！当灭世天火降临，引发生命物种的变异，大量死亡的人重新站起，变成丧尸，开始袭击自己曾经的同类，瞬间掉入食物链最底层的人类该如何寻找自己的出路？面对凶猛的变异兽，诡异的生化植物以及无穷无尽的丧尸潮，人类的文明还能够延续多久？欧阳风——一个末世之前的特种兵，将手持“天启之刃”，带领你重整地球秩序，寻找制造这场灾难的幕后敌人……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/39d400037396a63c5481~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"幻境城主","author_id":"","book_id":"6511591548549860359","book_name":"末世特种兵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":8,\"name\":\"科幻末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8\u0026name=科幻末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":68,\"name\":\"末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967:
